title: 'Mum You're Blooming Wonderful' | Engraved Mum's Garden Plant Pots Outdoor Indoor For Mum | Gifts For Mummy's Birthday | Garden Pots and Planters
features: Made from: galvanised tin, and with powder paint coating to prevent rust and ensure robustness.
The enamel planter has two handles securely attached on the side to make it easy to carry.
Flowers in images not included. No drainage holes.
description: Product Description If you’re looking for a thoughtful and unique gift for that special someone who lives amongst a jungle of flowers, our planter is a sure bet! Engraved with a message on the front that makes it personal to the lucky recipient! Your loved one can fill their boots with whatever takes their gardening fancy. From vibrant floral displays to herb gardens, our steel planter facilitates their obsession! Get that warm and fuzzy feeling only achievable by giving someone you love a thoughtful gift they’ll cherish forever with this planter! They’ll think of your generosity every time they get involved with their favourite pastime!
